summary_one_line: Input must carry the 'GDEF' tag plus a recognized version (major 1 or 2) so the switch dispatches to a real LigCaretList instead of the Null default.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed GDEF table: the four ASCII bytes 'GDEF' at offset 0x0c-0x0f and a recognized major version (0x0001 at offset 0x00-0x01) routing the switch (u.version.major) to case 1 (or case 2), avoiding the default Null(LigCaretList) branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All winner-resolving seeds carry 47 44 45 46 ('GDEF') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f and 00 01 at offsets 0x00-0x01, so the version-major switch hits case 1/case 2 (line 730 W shows T=17 F=3; line 732 W shows T=3 F=17) and the LigCaretList sanitize/dispatch path runs (W hits on OT::LigCaretList::sanitize = 35, L = 0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds lack the 'GDEF' tag and the 00 01 version at those offsets (offset 0x0c L bytes are 00/01/20/2c..., offset 0x00 L bytes are 00/e0/05/87...), so the table is not recognized, the switch falls to default and returns Null (line 734 L shows T=20 F=0), and the GDEF sanitize functions are never invoked (L hits = 0 across all GDEF sanitize functions).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer from the tag/version comparisons in the GDEF sanitize path and substitutes the exact expected operands ('GDEF', 0x0001) into the input at the matching offsets; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot guess the 6-byte tag+version constraint by havoc/gradient alone.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the default arm of a switch on the GDEF table major version, returning Null instead of a real LigCaretList.
The blocked default arm returns Null(LigCaretList).
Winner-resolving seeds carry the ASCII 'GDEF' tag at offset 0x0c.
At offsets 0x0c-0x0f every winner has the 'GDEF' bytes while losers differ, a concentrated dataflow signal.
Winners hold version 00 01 at offsets 0x00-0x01; losers do not.
When the switch is resolved, the GDEF/LigCaretList sanitize path executes for winners but never for losers.
The loser takes the default arm (T=20) while the winner reaches case 1/case 2.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 734  T=0 F=20  T=20 F=0  default: return Null(LigCaretList);  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which scans the input for a CMP operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace, so it cannot perform exact operand substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5228 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 13b375b9eff5c760` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 10 and 11 of the ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal for an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating only on the 'GDEF'/version switch in which naive resolves the default-vs-case-1 branch at the same rate as cmplog, showing havoc alone can satisfy the tag+version constraint without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff evidence shows 'GDEF' and version 00 01 are present in winners but does not directly prove the CmpLogObserver intercepted those exact comparisons; the dash-row floor is a lower-bound, not a literal I2SRandReplace tag.
